title: JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS - 211info
text: ACCESS JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Access point for being placed on Jackson County's Centralized Interest List for housing. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Households experiencing homelessness or at risk of becoming homeless. Access also focuses specifically on serving veterans experiencing homelessness. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 779-6691 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for screening and to make an appointment to be placed on the coordinated entry list. Households will be placed on the Centralized Interest List for available housing. Most appointments will be in-person rather than by phone. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
